reviews.review_description:
I had such high hopes for this app. I bought it back in December.  It had problems from the start( designs wouldn’t download,  controllers would get sticky). At one point I even returned it but then re-purchased it because the developer reached out to me.  But the last month the app has gotten progressively worse.  It crashes and when you try to download furniture, it won’t always download. It just keeps buffering.  I’ve reached out to the developer several times but it seems like they don’t believe me or they just don’t care.  Either way I’ve had it.  I don’t recommend purchasing this app not until the developer fixes the problems. No one wants to wait 5 to 10 minutes waiting for something to download or not download at all.  It’s ridiculous.

Update:Why is this app still up?  It obviously doesn’t work anymore but the developers are still allowed to make money off of it?  I bought it over a year ago so can’t get my money back but how is it okay that a non working app is still available for purchase?  Where’s the accountability?

I've been using the app for about 18 months but for the past week or so I haven't been able to log in. The error is stated to be lack of internet connection, but there's no issue at my end. I even uninstalled and removed before reinstalling but am still getting the error. I paid for a functional app, and that's all Iwant. Dev needs to sort this out or refund.

I just purchased and installed the App but I can’t seem to login with the error message at Login screen. 

Any HELP PLEASE!
Why???HELP!!!
Getting error about internet but my internet is fine. Please advise.

I worked on a project, but the items kept moving. I tried to lock them, but I was unsuccessful! There’s no option to save your design. It feels more like a marketplace than an app. Don’t waste your money!

had this app a cple of mths now, been a lil glitchy, but patients wins the day. But for the last wk, host error, you need to validate your ssl certificate guy's...so at the mo the game just wont launch....feel like i bought a choc fireguard

reviews.review_title: This is an amazing app -- more potential
reviews.review_description: This is an amazing app for envisioning furniture and designing your home spaces.  My main concern is though, I don't see any way to save my layouts?   Also, it would be great if there were more generic choices for furniture, maybe itemized by rooms, such as bedroom, kitchen area, den, etc.  Also, office furniture would be wonderful, as many people today have or want a home office and to envision the desk, file cabinets, copier, etc., would be fantastic.

I love this app it's very relaxing. It reminds me of Altspace VR. Not as advanced and not enough furniture for the kitchen and no bathrooms plus needs more rooms. Also, I need help retrieving saved work and playing with friends. Please help.

I'm very impressed with this app. However, I've had some minor issues, such as moving & positioning the furniture around. It was a bit of a struggle, but it was not worth removing stars from this app. 

Also, can you have a "save" option added (if possible).  I'm sure the developers are well aware of these issues, and I'm sure there will be many new updates coming soon & we're going to love them!!  Thank you.. I'm really enjoying this, and it's very therapeutic for me as well.

I can design spaces with my friend and even my own room with real world decor items. It gives a real world scale of items that I can try before purchasing which is awesome. Lost track of time and it is really satisfying to design a full room with items that I love, there are a lot of options to choose from. Really loving the app so far. :)

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your encouraging feedback! Really appreciate it.

Team Joyverse

reviews.review_description: This is a remarkable app and honestly something I have been hoping for … with Meta 3 you can see your room in fairly good clarity and you can visualize new furniture in your existing space.  It would be great if the library of furniture increases..it’s very satisfying to see furniture with so much clarity that doesn’t look cartoonish in the slightest, you can super impose furniture on top of your old furniture and won’t even see your old furniture….. what a wonderful idea, great work developers

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Really appreciate your encouraging comments. We will release new furniture/decor every week.

reviews.review_description:
the app is well maintained and has good graphics, but what I don't like is that I always have to be online (I use the mobile phone's hotspot and there are often line problems). I can understand that it takes the 3D models from the internet, but I would prefer to have a larger installation of many gigabytes installed directly on the viewer, rather than having a download of just over half a gigabyte and then constantly depending on the network.

but at least once the room with all the furnishings has been created it doesn't even allow me to disconnect and look at my creation, and as soon as I do so an error message warning me that I'm disconnected pops up in front of my view and doesn't let me move forward not even simply looking at the environment.

This app will receive five stars from me when its standalone offline functionality is implemented which is why five years ago I started with meta quest headsets, precisely because they can be network independent, but if you make more and more apps and games that they depend on the network I will be forced to abandon the VR, because I have no intention of using a viewer always connected to the network, for me the network is only used for downloads and updates.

furthermore the graphic render is currently under 1, it seems like 0.80 to me but I think that in the future you might be able to raise the resolution, perhaps, in reality the real problem for me is that I can never log out, I thought I could log out at least after having created the environment.

it would be beautiful (really beautiful) if once the environment was finished, the app allowed you to save an apk that you could launch independently and see your environment and walk around it, obviously offline

I didn't understand (not understanding English well) what that friction of buying furniture and objects refers to? but you buy 3D furniture, I don't understand?

developer_response.body:
Hi,

We will work on an offline and will release it in our subsequent updates. Thanks for your feedback!

Team Joyverse

reviews.review_description:
Constantly freezes and crashes. Doesn’t work. Tried to place a piece of furniture and it froze and reset positioning constantly. 

I’m also super upset that Meta would not refund my money after 15-20 mins of trying to get it to work and then asking for a refund.
This is the perfect designer game that you can just get caught up in for hours. If you’ve ever had that one animal crossing dlc happy home paradise it’s like that but in vr.

I like this game but I’m having trouble keeping things in its place when I exit the game, for example a tv on the wall I exit the game when I go back it’s off the wall or the plant is not on a table what am I doing wrong 😑 I’ve also tried locking the product and still nothing

Every time I try to place something a red mark pops up and the object I’m trying to add disappears. Has anyone else had that issue? Am I doing something wrong? Seems pretty straight forward so I don’t know what the issue is. Seems like a great app though. Hopefully I can get it to work eventually haha

developer_response.body:
Hi,
We have found and resolved the issue. Please try and let us know.
Thanks,
Arnab

reviews.review_description:
I would love to be able to give this app 5 stars. Maybe once the developer is able to fix the issues mentioned, I will.

When the app is working, it's wonderful. It's just those moments of glitches that take the joy away. 

It would be nice if there were more window dressings, different colors. More props. Items showing what size they are. Etc. 

I'll keep playing because I love to decorate, and every now and again this app allows me to do just that.

reviews.review_title: A paradise for Pinterest lovers like me!
reviews.review_description:
I love playing games that are into interior decoration, house flipper, remodeling and similar kind on my mobile. Renovations is therapy for me!
But this takes the experience to a new level. I am enjoying the color pass through mode on my quest 3 to see my design creations come to life in my room. However, I can’t afford to buy those furniture IRL.. haha.. but loving every moment of my play..

Few improvements I want to see…
Is there a paint feature? I couldn’t see it. It will be awesome to color the walls. I also wish if there is a way to bring in my own floor plan or say Zillow listings so that I can design my dream homes instead of being stuck with the limited room collection available on the game. Will you also be adding new rooms or room types on a regular basis? I didn’t see a kitchen.. 
overall, I am enjoying my time in this app. Definitely has a huge scope for improvement but worth every bit for what it provides today!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your encouraging comments. We will be working on the paint feature in January. And we will be adding new rooms every week.

reviews.review_description: It could have so much potential, glitches, bad graphics makes it frustrating… it also crashes a lot!
